mapper.select: select i.id, i.process_type, i.business_id, i.business_no, i.current_node_id, i.status, i.start_user_id, u.nick_name as start_user_name, i.start_time, i.end_time from crm_workflow_instance i left join sys_user u on i.start_user_id = u.user_id where i.id = #{id}
select id, process_type, business_id, business_no, current_node_id, status, start_user_id, start_time, end_time from crm_workflow_instance where business_id = #{businessId} and status = '0'

select n.id, n.instance_id, n.node_name, n.node_order, n.approver_id, u.nick_name as approver_name, n.approval_type, n.status, n.opinion, n.approve_time from crm_workflow_node n left join sys_user u on n.approver_id = u.user_id where n.instance_id = #{instanceId} order by n.node_order, n.id

select n.id, n.instance_id, n.node_name, n.node_order, n.approver_id, u.nick_name as approver_name, n.approval_type, n.status, n.opinion, n.approve_time from crm_workflow_node n left join sys_user u on n.approver_id = u.user_id where n.id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
select seq_crm_workflow_instance.nextval as id from DUAL
insert into crm_workflow_instance ( id, process_type, business_id, business_no, current_node_id, status, start_user_id, start_time ) values ( #{id}, #{processType}, #{businessId}, #{businessNo}, #{currentNodeId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{status}, #{startUserId}, sysdate )
mapper.update: update crm_workflow_node set status = '0', opinion = null, approve_time = null where instance_id = #{instanceId} and node_order >= #{nodeOrder}
